connections.description: From the Main Library (Zone A), head south on Central Spine Road to the Main Gate area — Reception is in Chancellor Building at Zone B.
From Reception, walk along the internal corridor east — Administration Office is in the same Chancellor Building at Zone E.
From Reception (Zone B), head north on Hartley Road — the Zepler Building (CS Department, Zone G) is on the left past the library.
From Administration Office (Zone E), head west along the internal corridor — Reception is at Zone B in the same Chancellor Building.
From the Cafeteria (Zone C, Cavendish Building), walk east along Central Spine Road — Reception / Main Building is at Zone B.
From the CS Department (Level 2–3), take the stairs or lift down to the ground floor — the Auditorium is in the same Zepler Building at ground level.
Classrooms are on multiple floors of the Zepler Building — check your timetable for your specific room number.
From CS Department (Level 2–3), take the stairs down to Level 1 — the Science Laboratory is on Level 1 of the Zepler Building.
From CS Department, take the lift or stairs to the ground floor — the Main Lecture Hall is at ground level in the same Zepler Building.
Seminar and meeting rooms are spread throughout the Zepler Building — check your booking confirmation for the room number and floor.
From the Main Library (Zone A), head south to Central Plaza then turn left onto East Road — follow East Road to East Gate and the Gymnasium (Zone K) is in the Athletico Complex.
The Gymnasium and Sports Centre are both in the Athletico Complex at Zone K — follow signs inside the complex.
From Reception (Zone B), walk west along Central Spine Road — the Cafeteria is in the Cavendish Building at Zone C.
